visual_description:
A high-angle, wide shot captures a group of five men in a modern office meeting room. Four of the men are seated around a large, dark table, while a fifth man stands with his arms crossed, observing them. The men at the table are dressed in what appear to be uniforms, possibly security or police, with white shirts and ties. The room has a professional and sterile feel, with a tiled floor, glass partitions in the background, and a monitor on a stand to the left. A black hat rests on the table. The on-screen text "风行网" is visible in the upper left corner. The camera remains static, providing a comprehensive view of the entire group and their environment. The audio is filled with a low, suspenseful, and slightly ominous musical score. The music is atmospheric and ambient, creating a sense of tension and anticipation, as if building up to a significant or clandestine event. There is no dialogue or any other sound effects, allowing the mysterious and serious mood of the score to dominate the soundscape.
